Headline: #92 Foster Temporary Westbound Reroute near Foster/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Westbound 92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted via Foster, Pulaski, Lawrence, Elston and Foster: due to, street blockage near Foster/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #92 Foster buses are temporarily rerouted via Foster, Pulaski, Lawrence, Elston and Foster: due to, street blockage near Foster/Pulaski.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
